meta.association_rule: Editorial edges describe ingredient compatibility, not dish composition or finished dishes.
meta.nut001_editorial_rule: NUT-001: culinary group assignment remains authoritative — peanut in Peanuts, almond in Tree Nuts, sesame in Edible Seeds.
meta.nut002_editorial_rule: NUT-002: whole and processed nut/seed canonical identities must not be treated as editorially interchangeable in Tier A relationships.
